title: EMPRESARIOS - 211info
text: HACIENDA COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION EMPRESARIOS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support to start or grow a business in the food industry. Offers monthly orientations, small business workshops, access to a commercial kitchen, capital, and connections to Portland’s network of entrepreneurial support. 6700 NE Killingsworth Street Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Unrestricted with a focus on Latino/a/e/x, immigrant, women, and minority-owned businesses Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm Email (503) 459-7608 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 595-2111 Main phone (503) 961-6432 Main phone Homeownership Program Intake (503) 459-7608 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of NE Killingsworth Street and NE Cully Boulevard Services: Business Development * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNTS HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SEMBRANDO SEMILLITAS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HACIENDA COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
